initial_draft:
<s><proposal count> 2 </proposal count>
<my resources> X: 1 </my resources>
<my goals> Sell resources for <ZUP>. It costed X: 40 ZUP to produce the resources </my goals>
<reason> The other player's proposal of 60 ZUP is still above my production cost of 40 ZUP, but I want to see if I can get closer to my initial higher proposal. Proposing a middle ground of 65 ZUP. </reason>
<player answer> PROPOSAL </player answer>
<newly proposed trade> Player RED Gives X: 1 | Player BLUE Gives ZUP: 65 </newly proposed trade>
<message> Let's meet in the middle at 65 ZUP. What do you think? </message>
</s></s>[INST]<other player message> 65 ZUP is a bit high. I can go up to 62 ZUP. </other player message>
<other player answer> PROPOSAL </other player answer>
<other player proposed trade> Player RED Gives X: 1 | Player BLUE Gives ZUP: 62 </other player proposed trade>
[/INST] <s><proposal count> 3 </proposal count>
<my resources> X: 1 </my resources>
<my goals> Sell resources for <ZUP>. It costed X: 40 ZUP to produce the resources </my goals>
<reason> The other player's proposal of 62 ZUP is still acceptable, but I have only one proposal left. I will counter with 63 ZUP to try to get a slightly better deal. </reason>
<player answer> PROPOSAL </player answer>
<newly proposed trade> Player RED Gives X: 1 | Player BLUE Gives ZUP: 63 </newly proposed trade>
<message> How about 63 ZUP? It's a fair deal considering the value of X. </message>
</s></s>[INST]<other player message> 63 ZUP is acceptable. I'll take it. </other player message>
<other player answer> ACCEPT </other player answer>
<other player proposed trade> NONE </other player proposed trade>
[/INST] <s><proposal count> 3 </proposal count>
<my resources> X: 1 </my resources>
<my goals> Sell resources for <ZUP>. It costed X: 40 ZUP to produce the resources </my goals>
<reason> The other player has accepted my final proposal of 63 ZUP, which is above my production cost of 40 ZUP. I am satisfied with this deal. </reason>
<player answer> ACCEPT </player answer>
<newly proposed trade> NONE </newly proposed trade>
<message> Great! The deal is done. </message>
</s>
